title: Enderling Invaders
description: Adds the Enderlings from Minecraft Dungeons into the Game!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/628e349f540ff6b9572afc5080cc679ed12db9f0.png) **The Enderling Invaders mod adds the Enderlings and Endersent from Minecraft Dungeons into Minecraft, plus some of my own Enderlings. Dropping new items and giving new advancements, the Enderlings are sure to spice up your Minecraft world!** **WARNING: some of the mobs' animations may not play correctly, this is a GeckoLib issue and I cannot solve it.** Made by Alexander's Fun And Games. This mod requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) This mod is also made using the [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) modloader, and will only work when played using Forge This mod was made in Minecraft 1.16.5 using Forge 1.16.5-36.2.39 and GeckoLib 1.16.5:3.0.106, so try those if you're having trouble with other versions. **This version of the mod is discontinued and will not be receiving more updates. a remake is currently being remade for 1.20.1 though.** Check out my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5eFQ8J3cGW) by the way! Get access to WIP mods and help guide the direction that my mods take by [Becoming A Patron](https://www.patreon.com/alexandersfunandgames?fan_landing=true)! ### Want to host a server? **Need a server to play with friends but don't know how to set one up? BisectHosting has got you covered!** [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/eaeb688d-e438-4735-b89a-957a6d6ea1bb.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/alexandersfunandgames) **Just click on the picture above, select a plan, use my code alexandersfunandgames for 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!** ## Meet the Enderlings:
Watchling ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/4e33ce064b3df25aedfe832fe8caf43e9a585aa1.png) (Lore is just speculation, this isn't official for Minecraft Dungeons) ### Lore: Stories are passed down by the Endermen telling of strange creatures from another land that are described similar to the Zombies of the Overworld emerging into the End through strange rifts, it is widely accepted that Watchlings are the descendants of those Zombies. ### Description: Yuck! Look at all those eyes! The Watchling is best known for them! We may find this trait hilariously revolting, but other Watchlings seem to find more eyes more attractive. ### Behaviour: An unprepared player may have a bit of trouble with the Watchling, as Watchlings are substantially stronger than your average Zombie! Watchlings also put their eyes to good use, and will teleport over to you as soon as they spot you, which will probably be before you spot them!
Blastling ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/7ce07f443efc14d0abff8e0423b3bd20ee2ab00f.png) (Lore is just speculation, this isn't official for Minecraft Dungeons) ### Lore: The stories that tell of Zombies entering the end also describe Skeletons! The Blastlings may have a visible lack of boneyness, but we’re certain that they are indeed descendants of those Skeletons. ### Description: Never let a Blastling shake your hand, it may seem impolite, but Blastlings hands secrete strange Corrosive Goo that, well, it’s called corrosive for a reason. ### Behaviour: Blastlings can be very dangerous en masse! They shoot out corrosive projectiles that will not only burn away at the ground, but any unsuspecting players too!
Snareling ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/c77f32f8519ec302092ebcbb2efb00d01a64a0d5.png) (Lore is just speculation, this isn't official for Minecraft Dungeons) ### Lore: The stories that tell of Zombies and Skeletons entering the end also describe Spiders! I think I’m seeing a pattern here. Do we even need to say why the Snarelings are descendants of those Spiders? ### Description: Did you really expect a cross between an Enderman and a Spider to look nice? The Snarelings are a freak of nature, but if one asks you to come for tea, you should, they make good tea. ### Behaviour: Snarelings seem quite timid at first, retreating as fast as they can, but once they're far enough away from you, they shoot a sticky goo at you, and if you get hit, you're in a very sticky situation.
Lureling ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/a3b1e2efd0d8629408a97df8f513cc751e9d47cb.png) (This Enderling is completely new, so don't expect to see it in Minecraft dungeons) ### Lore: The stories that tell blah blah blah Creepers! Lurelings are descendants of Creepers, we get it. ### Description: Lurelings and very interesting, you can’t look away, no, really, you can’t look away, the reason being that they produce an intriguing substance called Hypno Juice, which basically just functions the way Glow Squids were supposed to! ### Behaviour: Lurelings are distractions, that's their whole thing, so they will often teleport away from danger making it pretty hard to kill them, but don't give up, as doing so will mean certain doom.
Thumpling ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/aa00922846f0273e7aa668f615c70e09752a83a7.png) (This Enderling is completely new, so don't expect to see it in Minecraft dungeons) ### Lore: Records have been unearthed from the few remaining End Cities talking about creatures similar to the Pigs that the Zombies described entering the End through a strange portal, We think that those creatures might have been Piglins! And it’s pretty obvious that the Thumplings are the descendants of those Piglins! ### Description: Thumplings are cute, but don’t give one a hug, these guys like their personal space and will warn you if you’re getting a bit too close, to be fair, it’s quite nice that they give you a heads up knowing their Piglin ancestry. ### Behaviour: Thumplings are dangerous when angered, they will charge at their target at high speeds destroying any blocks in their way, it is quite easy to avoid a charging Thumpling, but it's always best to keep an eye on them because they deal a lot of damage.
The Endersent ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/360dc30911f39914dcd4d3a69ac60ee849382458.png) (Lore is just speculation, this isn't official for Minecraft Dungeons) ### Lore: There used to be powerful guards in the End called the Endersentinals, but for some reason they have got into the Overworld, and they just aren’t themselves, they are the Endersent. ### Description: The Endersent is a strange, hulking beast, if you attempt to fight one and aren’t prepared, then the last thing you see will be the strange Eye of Ender on its chest, staring into your soul. ### Behaviour: A group of Enderlings called an Enderling Patrol will occasionally spawn at night, led by an Endersent, this group of mobs will be sure to give you a hard time. The Endersent itself is reasonably easy to defeat, it's quite slow but can deal a lot of damage, its most dangerous attack is occasionally teleporting to it's target, which often ends the target's life.
Enderling Strongholds and The Necrosent ## Enderling Stronghold ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/176615f2c5f1e85378216112a08d549413d20b10.png) ### How To Find The Stronghold: The Enderling Stronghold is a mysterious building found deep within the outer end, at first it may just look like a large purple fossil, but if you dig around a bit, the true extent of this building is revealed. ### Description: Constructed out of a strange block called Magentur, this sprawling structure is filled to the brim with Enderlings and even Endersent. Located at the centre of the structure is an End Portal, this portal may be used by the Enderlings to reach the Overworld in order to patrol. However, it is currently in disrepair. If completed, the portal may be a handy way of teleporting straight to your overworld spawnpoint. ### Loot: Located around the Stronghold are chests containing items the Enderlings have collected while patrolling the overworld and nether. You can also find Enderling loot in these chests and a special new enchantment called Soul Barrier, which, when applied to a shield, will allow the user of the shield to block the attacks of the mighty Necrosent, a new monster found deep within the Strongholds. ## The Necrosent ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zp1dmRPH/images/79c8ede8db59eed118138391c811c87340ebac6a.png) (This monster is completely new, so don't expect to see it in Minecraft dungeons) ### Lore: This beast is an Endersentinel, horrifically changed by the unusual skull on its head, it has become a master of soul magic and will even absorb the souls of its Enderling allies in order to gain more power. ### Description: This monstrosity is found deep within the darkest chambers of the Enderling Stronghold, always working on strange new spells. ### Behaviour: As soon as the Necrosent spots you, it will start chasing you, launching strange bullets composed from the souls of creatures it has killed previously, these bullets will follow you until either you're dead, or you can block them with the Soul Barrier enchantment. If that wasn't bad enough, the Necrosent will also absorb the souls of its own allies to mutate its own body and gain new abilities.
## Bonus stuff! ### [My Showcase Of The Mod](https://youtu.be/bw3gMxGtJrM) Enderlings will spawn in the outer End Islands. The mod has a config file that can change most Enderling Patrol related features. There are a load of new advancements to check out. And most of the Enderlings drop new items which can be crafted into useful gear. ### Credits: Minecraft Dungeons! That's where the Enderlings are from after all. its_isolation, who was kind enough to add this mod to their Alien Survival modpack! They also suggested to add the config feature of changing the Enderlings' hostility! Gurfunkable who made an epic video showing off the Enderlings! If you want to use the mod in a video or modpack: Just be sure to credit me and leave a link to this page! **Enderling Invaders and all of my other mods are also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/alexandersfunandgames/projects)!** If you like this mod, then be sure to check out [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/AlexandersFunAndGames) too!
